blog_title: DTF vs Screen Print vs Embroidery — Real Cost Breakdown on ₹500 T-Shirt for Indian Printers
caption:
₹500 tee. Three methods. Three profit margins 🤯

Screen print? ₹335 profit per piece. DTF? ₹315. Embroidery? ₹280–₹300.

But here's the catch: screen needs 50 minimum. DTF scales from 1 piece. Embroidery commands higher perceived value.

Your order size + selling price = your winner.

Save this post before your next bulk order 👇
